prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically addresses the water situation in north-west England, mentioning regions such as Cumbria, Lancashire, Greater Manchester, Merseyside, and Cheshire, which are all in England. There is no relevance to Scotland or any specific information regarding its water situation.
